printed.name: Stomach Massage Reaching
printed.setup: Starting in Stomach Massage Flat Back position (page 58), back straight, arms staight, reaching up and forward, wide V position, palms facing down

movement.exhale: Straighten legs, dorsiflex feet, plantarflex feet
movement.inhale: Bend legs, return to start position

cues: Keep arms on consistent diagonal line
Straighten legs completely prior to dorsiflexion and plantarflexion
